items.title: FIFA wishes Malayalees on Vishu, posts AI-generated picture of Messi alongside traditional Vishu Kani
items.summary: The FIFA World Cup page also brightened the propitious day for Keralites by conveying the international sports body’s Vishu Greetings in Malayalam, “Vishu Ashamsakal”.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Will LSG unleash 'match-ready' Mayank against RCB?
items.summary: The LSG fast bowler is finally good to go, after building up his workload on the sidelines during the early weeks of IPL 2026
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Why Bellingham can rescue Real Madrid's Euro dream
items.summary: Jude Bellingham was behind Real Madrid's late resurgence against Bayern Munich last week in their Champions League first-leg tie, and could be key in Wednesday's return.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
